overhaul_note.title: Understand Enderman Overhaul — 20+ variants across biomes, each drops a standard ender pearl

subtitle.text: Twenty variants. One drop. The Enderman Overhaul does not change the farm — it changes the farm's scenery.

description: CH.09 · THE PEARL FARM
▸ Ender Pearls are the infrastructure of the Eye Hunt.
The Eye of Ender recipe requires them.
So does most End Remastered custom eye crafting.
So does your escape plan when the farm goes wrong.
Farm early. Farm a lot.
◈ ENDERMAN OVERHAUL VARIANTS
└ 20+ variants — each biome has its own Enderman type
└ All variants drop standard Ender Pearl (vanilla drop)
└ Notable variants:
✦ Jungle Enderman: leafy texture, smaller hitbox
✦ Badlands Enderman: red-striped, aggressive faster
✦ Desert Enderman: sandstone tones, larger
✦ End Enderman: classic look + eldritch variant
✦ Magical Enderman: unique glow, rare spawn
(Magical Enderman behavior: unresolved — treat
as a boss encounter until confirmed otherwise)
└ Looting III: increases pearl drop rate
└ Farm tip: any biome works — pick the biome
where you have an AFK farm setup already
◈ PEARL ECONOMY
└ Eye of Ender craft: Pearl + Blaze Powder
└ End Remastered custom eyes: require pearls +
specific boss drops per eye type
└ Ender Chest: 1 Pearl + 8 Obsidian
└ Chorus Teleport: Ender Pearl throw = safe gap-close
in End Cities (2.5 heart fall damage, manageable)
◈ ENDERMAN FARM SETUP
└ Platform at Y=128+ over the End main island
(post-portal) = highest density Enderman farm
└ Endermite bait: place Endermite in minecart
Endermen aggro on Endermites passively
└ Looting III + Silk Touch on separate swords
(don't combine — you'll need both)
▸ Every pearl in your hand
was a teleport that did not happen.
Hold them carefully.
Use them deliberately.
▶ Collect 16 Ender Pearls
▶ Learn the Enderman Overhaul variants [check]
◇ The Magical Enderman is flagged unresolved.
If it spawns, do not engage assuming standard AI.
Treat it as you would treat any unique mob:
observe first.
